tests.title: Should display Sign Up page with all required elements
tests.describe: Account Type Step - Smoke Tests > Positive Tests for the "Account type" sign up step
tests.scenarioIntent: A visitor opens the sign-up page and sees all required elements: email input, three account type tiles (Company, Contractor, Employee), Google sign-up option, and Terms of Service text. Merge candidate with c0977caa9b80.

tests.title: Should display all three account type options with descriptions
tests.describe: Account Type Step - Smoke Tests > Positive Tests for the "Account type" sign up step
tests.scenarioIntent: A visitor opens the sign-up page and sees all three account type tiles (Company, Contractor, Employee) each with its own label and description. Merge candidate with 29012d0be811.

tests.title: Should accept valid email format
tests.describe: Account Type Step - Smoke Tests > Positive Tests for the "Account type" sign up step
tests.scenarioIntent: A visitor types a well-formed email address into the email field on the sign-up page and the field retains the typed value.

tests.title: Should display Terms of Service link
tests.describe: Account Type Step - Smoke Tests > Positive Tests for the "Account type" sign up step
tests.scenarioIntent: A visitor opens the sign-up page and the Terms of Service agreement text is visible.

tests.title: Should proceed to next step successfully when company type selected, email entered and terms agreed
tests.describe: Account Type Step - Smoke Tests > Positive Tests for the "Account type" sign up step
tests.scenarioIntent: A visitor selects the Company account type, enters a valid email address, accepts the Terms of Service, clicks Next, and is taken to the email verification step.

tests.title: Should show error for invalid email format
tests.describe: Account Type Step - Smoke Tests > Negative Tests for the "Account type" sign up step
tests.scenarioIntent: A visitor enters a malformed email address (e.g. missing '@'), accepts Terms, and clicks Next — an invalid email error toast appears and the user stays on step 1.

tests.title: Should show error for empty email
tests.describe: Account Type Step - Smoke Tests > Negative Tests for the "Account type" sign up step
tests.scenarioIntent: A visitor accepts Terms and clicks Next without entering any email address — an email required error toast appears and the user stays on step 1.

tests.title: Should show error for already registered email
tests.describe: Account Type Step - Smoke Tests > Negative Tests for the "Account type" sign up step
tests.scenarioIntent: A visitor enters an email address that already has an existing account, accepts Terms, and clicks Next — an email already registered error toast appears and the user stays on step 1.
dependencies: EXISTING_CLIENT_EMAIL env/constant — a pre-seeded registered account; test fails if this account is deleted

tests.title: Should not proceed without accepting Terms
tests.describe: Account Type Step - Smoke Tests > Negative Tests for the "Account type" sign up step
tests.scenarioIntent: A visitor enters a valid email but clicks Next without ticking the Terms of Service checkbox — a terms-not-accepted error toast appears and the user stays on step 1.

tests.title: Should display "Verify your email" page with all required elements
tests.describe: Verify Email Step - Smoke Tests > Positive Tests for the "Verify your email" step
tests.scenarioIntent: After submitting their email in step 1, the user sees the email verification page with all required UI elements. Merge candidate with f083c5fa7299, 0be513331f79, ba8fd40b4660.

tests.title: Should display the email address used during registration
tests.describe: Verify Email Step - Smoke Tests > Positive Tests for the "Verify your email" step
tests.scenarioIntent: The email verification page shows back the same email address the user entered in step 1. Merge candidate with ca927d9fcbc9.

tests.title: Should display all 4 code input boxes with placeholder dashes
tests.describe: Verify Email Step - Smoke Tests > Positive Tests for the "Verify your email" step
tests.scenarioIntent: The email verification page renders four individual input boxes with placeholder dashes for the 4-digit code. Merge candidate with ca927d9fcbc9.

tests.title: Should display "Resend it" and "Sign In" links
tests.describe: Verify Email Step - Smoke Tests > Positive Tests for the "Verify your email" step
tests.scenarioIntent: The email verification page shows a Resend link and a Sign In link. Merge candidate with ca927d9fcbc9.
tests.skipReason: Consolidated into ca927d9fcbc9 ("displays … all required elements"), which already asserts both the Resend and Sign In locators. Dropped as a strict subset during the 2026-06-24 verify-email consolidation. Not a regression: the migrated spec passes serially (--workers=1).

tests.title: Should navigate back when "Back" button is clicked
tests.describe: Verify Email Step - Smoke Tests > Positive Tests for the "Verify your email" step
tests.scenarioIntent: A user on the email verification step clicks Back and is returned to step 1 where the email input field is visible.

tests.title: Should proceed to next step with valid verification code
tests.describe: Verify Email Step - Smoke Tests > Positive Tests for the "Verify your email" step
tests.scenarioIntent: A user enters the correct bypass verification code on the email verification step and advances to the General Info step.
dependencies: BYPASS_VERIFICATION_CODE constant — sandbox-only bypass; absent in production

tests.title: Should show error when submitting empty code
tests.describe: Verify Email Step - Smoke Tests > Negative Tests for the "Verify your email" step
tests.scenarioIntent: A user clicks Next on the email verification step without entering any code — an invalid code error toast appears and the user stays on the verification step.

tests.title: Should show error for invalid verification code
tests.describe: Verify Email Step - Smoke Tests > Negative Tests for the "Verify your email" step
tests.scenarioIntent: A user enters a complete but wrong 4-digit verification code (e.g. '0000') and clicks Next — an invalid code error toast appears and the user stays on the verification step.

tests.title: Should show error for incomplete verification code
tests.describe: Verify Email Step - Smoke Tests > Negative Tests for the "Verify your email" step
tests.scenarioIntent: A user enters fewer than 4 digits (e.g. '12') and clicks Next — an invalid code error toast appears and the user stays on the verification step.

tests.title: Should display "General info" page with all required fields
tests.describe: General Info Step - Smoke Tests > Positive Tests for the "General info" step
tests.scenarioIntent: After verifying their email, the user is on the General Info step and sees all required form fields: first name, middle name, last name, country selector, phone number, password. Merge candidate with 8567a09b3be7.

tests.title: Should be on step 2 "Your Information"
tests.describe: General Info Step - Smoke Tests > Positive Tests for the "General info" step
tests.scenarioIntent: The step indicator on the General Info page confirms the user is at the 'your-information' step of the wizard. Merge candidate with 0834f11e3bee.

tests.title: Should accept valid form data in all fields
tests.describe: General Info Step - Smoke Tests > Positive Tests for the "General info" step
tests.scenarioIntent: A user fills in all General Info fields with valid data and each field retains the entered value.

tests.title: Should allow Middle name to be optional
tests.describe: General Info Step - Smoke Tests > Positive Tests for the "General info" step
tests.scenarioIntent: A user fills in all required General Info fields but leaves Middle Name empty, clicks Register, and advances to the Company Info step — Middle Name is optional and its absence does not block the form.

tests.title: Should proceed to Company Info step after filling all fields and clicking Register
tests.describe: General Info Step - Smoke Tests > Positive Tests for the "General info" step
tests.scenarioIntent: A user completes all required General Info fields and clicks Register, advancing to the Company Info step.

tests.title: Should show error when submitting empty form
tests.describe: General Info Step - Smoke Tests > Negative Tests for the "General info" step
tests.scenarioIntent: A user clicks Register on the General Info step without filling in any fields — a required fields error toast appears and the user stays on the step.

tests.title: Should show error when First name is empty
tests.describe: General Info Step - Smoke Tests > Negative Tests for the "General info" step
tests.scenarioIntent: A user fills in all General Info fields except First Name and clicks Register — a required fields error toast appears and the user stays on the step.

tests.title: Should show error when Last name is empty
tests.describe: General Info Step - Smoke Tests > Negative Tests for the "General info" step
tests.scenarioIntent: A user fills in all General Info fields except Last Name and clicks Register — a required fields error toast appears and the user stays on the step.

tests.title: Should show error when Country is not selected
tests.describe: General Info Step - Smoke Tests > Negative Tests for the "General info" step
tests.scenarioIntent: A user fills in all General Info fields except Country and clicks Register — a required fields error toast appears and the user stays on the step.

tests.title: Should show error when Phone number is empty
tests.describe: General Info Step - Smoke Tests > Negative Tests for the "General info" step
tests.scenarioIntent: A user fills in all General Info fields except Phone Number and clicks Register — a required fields error toast appears and the user stays on the step.

tests.title: Should show error when Password is empty
tests.describe: General Info Step - Smoke Tests > Negative Tests for the "General info" step
tests.scenarioIntent: A user fills in all General Info fields except Password and clicks Register — a password required error toast appears (distinct from the generic required fields message) and the user stays on the step.

tests.title: Should navigate to Company Info step successfully
tests.describe: Company Info Step - Smoke Tests > Positive Tests for the "Company info" step
tests.scenarioIntent: A user who has completed all prior steps (account type, email verification, general info) arrives at the Company Info step and the page is displayed.

tests.title: Should proceed to next step after filling all Company Info fields
tests.describe: Company Info Step - Smoke Tests > Positive Tests for the "Company info" step
tests.scenarioIntent: A user completes the entire registration wizard by filling all Company Info fields (legal name, company type, registration number, employee count, currency, address, country, city) and clicking Next — registration completes, the browser navigates to '/activity', and the user's first name is visible on the activity page. NOTE: creates a real account per run; teardown required.
dependencies: Creates a real company account — no teardown in legacy; migration must add API-level cleanup

tests.title: Intercept registration API calls @manual
tests.describe: intercept-registration.spec.ts (standalone script — no describe block)
tests.scenarioIntent: Network-interception exploratory script that captures all API calls and auth storage during a live registration flow for API discovery purposes.
tests.skipReason: Exploratory interception script used for API discovery; not a CI test and has no assertions.

tests.title: Should complete onboarding and approve KYB successfully

tests.scenarioIntent: A newly registered client submits their company's KYB documentation via the Confirm Company Details form; an admin then approves KYB via API; the client reloads the activity page and the KYB card is no longer present. Scenario cluster B1.

tests.title: Should save company profile with all required fields

tests.scenarioIntent: A newly registered client clicks the Complete Company Profile card on the activity page, fills all required fields on the Company Info settings tab, saves, and sees a success toast. Scenario cluster C1.

Scenario cluster A1.

tests.title: TC_EOR_API_000: GET /api/static/currencies returns currency list @smoke
tests.describe: EOR Contracts API — Salary Currency (PD-13186)
tests.scenarioIntent: GET /api/static/currencies returns a non-empty currency list where each entry exposes id, code and symbol, so currency codes (USD/EUR) can be resolved to numeric IDs for all downstream salary-currency operations.

tests.title: TC_EOR_API_001: GET contract — salary_currency field is present @smoke @critical
tests.describe: EOR Contracts API — Salary Currency (PD-13186) > Edit Flow — Salary Currency
tests.scenarioIntent: On an unsigned (Pending company signature) EOR contract, GET details exposes a salary_currency object (id+code) that is distinct from the billing currency field, confirming salary currency is a first-class, separately-tracked field.
dependencies: env: EOR_CONTRACT_REF + EOR_CONTRACT_ID pointing at a 'Pending company signature' EOR contract; skips if unset
tests.notes: Ported; self-skips at runtime without EOR_CONTRACT_REF (Pending-company-signature EOR contract). TODO(api-preconditions): seed a real EOR contract in the cleanup phase.

tests.title: TC_EOR_API_003: PATCH contract — client can change salary currency via edit flow @regression @critical
tests.describe: EOR Contracts API — Salary Currency (PD-13186) > Edit Flow — Salary Currency
tests.scenarioIntent: Client PATCHes the salary currency on an unsigned EOR contract (PATCH /api/contract/fulltime/{id}) and the change persists — a subsequent GET returns the new salary_currency.id.
dependencies: env: EOR_CONTRACT_REF + EOR_CONTRACT_ID (Pending company signature); skips if unset
tests.notes: Ported (Edit Flow describe); self-skips without EOR_CONTRACT_ID/REF. TODO(api-preconditions) seed EOR contract; TODO(cleanup) split stateful chain.

tests.title: TC_EOR_API_004: Allowance currency inherits salary currency after edit @regression
tests.describe: EOR Contracts API — Salary Currency (PD-13186) > Edit Flow — Salary Currency
tests.scenarioIntent: After a salary-currency edit, every allowance on the contract is valid (name + positive amount) and, when the API exposes allowance.currency_id, it matches the new salary currency — i.e. allowances inherit the salary currency. Self-skips when the editable contract has no allowances.
dependencies: env: EOR_CONTRACT_REF + EOR_CONTRACT_ID; skips if unset or no allowances
tests.notes: Ported (Edit Flow describe); self-skips without EOR_CONTRACT_ID/REF. TODO(api-preconditions) seed EOR contract; TODO(cleanup) split stateful chain.

tests.title: TC_EOR_API_005: Billing currency unchanged after salary currency edit @regression
tests.describe: EOR Contracts API — Salary Currency (PD-13186) > Edit Flow — Salary Currency
tests.scenarioIntent: Editing the salary currency leaves the billing currency (contract.currency.id) untouched — proving salary and billing currencies are decoupled.
dependencies: env: EOR_CONTRACT_REF + EOR_CONTRACT_ID; skips if unset
tests.notes: Ported (Edit Flow describe); self-skips without EOR_CONTRACT_ID/REF. TODO(api-preconditions) seed EOR contract; TODO(cleanup) split stateful chain.

tests.title: TC_EOR_API_006: Other contract fields unchanged after currency edit @regression
tests.describe: EOR Contracts API — Salary Currency (PD-13186) > Edit Flow — Salary Currency
tests.scenarioIntent: A salary-currency-only edit must not mutate unrelated fields — amount, name and start_date are identical before and after the PATCH.
dependencies: env: EOR_CONTRACT_REF + EOR_CONTRACT_ID; skips if unset
tests.notes: Ported (Edit Flow describe); self-skips without EOR_CONTRACT_ID/REF. TODO(api-preconditions) seed EOR contract; TODO(cleanup) split stateful chain.

tests.title: TC_EOR_API_007: Currency-only edit does NOT set webhook_dispatched @regression
tests.describe: EOR Contracts API — Salary Currency (PD-13186) > Edit Flow — Salary Currency
tests.scenarioIntent: A salary-currency-only edit is a non-material change: the PATCH response body must not carry a webhook_dispatched property, confirming no external webhook fires for currency-only edits.
dependencies: env: EOR_CONTRACT_REF + EOR_CONTRACT_ID; skips if unset
tests.notes: Ported (Edit Flow describe); self-skips without EOR_CONTRACT_ID/REF. TODO(api-preconditions) seed EOR contract; TODO(cleanup) split stateful chain.

tests.title: TC_EOR_API_008: POST /api/contract/amendment/add — currency amendment on active contract @smoke @critical
tests.describe: EOR Contracts API — Salary Currency (PD-13186) > Amendment Flow — Salary Currency
tests.scenarioIntent: On an Ongoing EOR contract, the client raises a currency-change amendment (POST /api/contract/amendment/add) and the API confirms success with an 'amended successfully' message.
dependencies: Auto-discovered clean Ongoing EOR contract (has_amendment=false, can_amend=true) via findCleanOngoingEOR; skips if none found
tests.notes: Migrated (Amendment Flow, serial). GREEN end-to-end vs sandbox via findCleanOngoingEOR auto-discovery (create→client sign→admin sign_as_provider→Ongoing). TODO(cleanup): one-shot — mutates the discovered contract; seed fresh EOR per run later.

tests.title: TC_EOR_API_009: Amendment sets has_amendment flag on contract @regression @critical
tests.describe: EOR Contracts API — Salary Currency (PD-13186) > Amendment Flow — Salary Currency
tests.scenarioIntent: After raising a currency amendment, the contract's has_amendment flag flips to true, signalling a pending amendment awaiting signatures.
tests.notes: Migrated (Amendment Flow, serial). GREEN end-to-end vs sandbox via findCleanOngoingEOR auto-discovery (create→client sign→admin sign_as_provider→Ongoing). TODO(cleanup): one-shot — mutates the discovered contract; seed fresh EOR per run later.

tests.title: TC_EOR_API_011: Amendment response contains no salary-decrease error @regression
tests.describe: EOR Contracts API — Salary Currency (PD-13186) > Amendment Flow — Salary Currency
tests.scenarioIntent: A currency-only amendment is not treated as a salary decrease — the amended contract carries no salary_decrease_error, confirming currency changes bypass the salary-reduction guard.
tests.notes: Migrated (Amendment Flow, serial). GREEN end-to-end vs sandbox via findCleanOngoingEOR auto-discovery (create→client sign→admin sign_as_provider→Ongoing). TODO(cleanup): one-shot — mutates the discovered contract; seed fresh EOR per run later.

tests.title: TC_EOR_API_013: Currency-only amendment does not set webhook_dispatched @regression
tests.describe: EOR Contracts API — Salary Currency (PD-13186) > Amendment Flow — Salary Currency
tests.scenarioIntent: A currency-only amendment is non-material: the contract record returned after the amendment must not carry webhook_dispatched, mirroring TC-007 for the amendment path.
tests.notes: Migrated (Amendment Flow, serial). GREEN end-to-end vs sandbox via findCleanOngoingEOR auto-discovery (create→client sign→admin sign_as_provider→Ongoing). TODO(cleanup): one-shot — mutates the discovered contract; seed fresh EOR per run later.

tests.title: TC_EOR_API_016: Billing currency unchanged after amendment @regression
tests.describe: EOR Contracts API — Salary Currency (PD-13186) > Amendment Flow — Salary Currency
tests.scenarioIntent: A salary-currency amendment leaves the billing currency unchanged (compared against the billing currency captured in beforeAll before the amendment was raised) — the amendment-path equivalent of TC-005.

tests.title: TC_EOR_API_010: Client can sign contract after amendment @regression @critical
tests.describe: EOR Contracts API — Salary Currency (PD-13186) > Amendment Flow — Salary Currency
tests.scenarioIntent: The client signs the pending amendment via POST /api/contract/signature (signer name derived from the contract signatory); treats an already-signed contract as success. First gate of the two-party amendment completion.
dependencies: Auto-discovered Ongoing EOR contract; self-skips if no pending amendment
tests.notes: Migrated (Amendment Flow, serial). GREEN end-to-end vs sandbox via findCleanOngoingEOR auto-discovery (create→client sign→admin sign_as_provider→Ongoing). TODO(cleanup): one-shot — mutates the discovered contract; seed fresh EOR per run later.

tests.title: TC_EOR_API_015: Admin sign_as_provider completes amendment — contract Ongoing @regression @critical
tests.describe: EOR Contracts API — Salary Currency (PD-13186) > Amendment Flow — Salary Currency
tests.scenarioIntent: Admin signs as provider (POST /api/admin/contract/fulltime/{id}/sign_as_provider) to complete the amendment; the contract returns to Ongoing and its salary_currency now equals the amendment target (id+code), with allowances still valid and inheriting the new currency. Final gate of the full edit->amend->sign->activate flow.
tests.notes: Migrated (Amendment Flow, serial). GREEN end-to-end vs sandbox via findCleanOngoingEOR auto-discovery (create→client sign→admin sign_as_provider→Ongoing). TODO(cleanup): one-shot — mutates the discovered contract; seed fresh EOR per run later.

tests.title: Should complete contractor registration and login successfully
tests.describe: Contractor Registration - Happy Path @smoke @critical
tests.scenarioIntent: A new contractor self-registers end-to-end through the UI — select account type, enter email, accept terms, verify via OTP (read from DB), fill personal info, submit — and lands authenticated on the Activity page with a personalised welcome greeting.
dependencies: DB access for OTP (remotewise users table via SSH tunnel/db-connection-manager)
tests.skipReason: TODO(api-preconditions): worker email OTP is random; the 9999 bypass is client-only (ContractorService.php does not pass email to generate_otp_code; see docs/40-domain/otp-bypass-client-vs-worker.md). No admin/API OTP read or force-verify path exists; only legacy path was a DB read (removed). Unblock once Azeddine backend fix ships, then port via /api/contractor/{signup,verify} with otp=9999, no DB.

tests.title: Should complete type selection and CSV upload flow
tests.describe: Bulk Import - Type Selection & Upload @ui @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: On the bulk-import wizard, worker-type and contract-type are required (each missing selection shows its specific validation error); a valid Contractors+Fixed selection proceeds to Upload, and a clean CSV uploads successfully and advances to the Review table.
tests.notes: type-and-upload: type selection + CSV upload — GREEN serial (5.1s)

tests.title: Should download CSV templates with correct headers for each contract type
tests.describe: Bulk Import - Type Selection & Upload @ui @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: For each contract type (Fixed, PAYG, Milestone) the Upload page offers a downloadable CSV template whose header row exactly matches the expected per-type column set (PAYG adds Rate; Milestone omits payment-schedule columns).
dependencies: no CSV needed — exercises template download
tests.notes: type-and-upload template-headers — ported verbatim; TODO(flaky): Milestone downloaded template headers drifted (+3 vs hardcoded expected list).

tests.title: Should display review table with correct data, filters, and search @smoke
tests.describe: Bulk Import - Review Table @ui @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: After uploading a clean Fixed CSV, the Review table shows the CoR info alert, correct totals (17 contracts, 9 CoR, 17 rows), per-row CoR checkbox state matching the CSV, working Errors/All filters, and name search that narrows to a single matching row.
tests.notes: review-table: display/filter/search — GREEN serial (6.0s)

tests.title: Should toggle CoR in table and sidebar with count updates
tests.describe: Bulk Import - Review Table @ui @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: CoR can be toggled both from the table checkbox and the edit sidebar, and the CoR count updates consistently in both directions (9->8->9, then 8 after saving a sidebar toggle).
tests.notes: review-table toggle-CoR — ported verbatim; TODO(flaky): CoR row detaches on re-render after toggle (scrollIntoViewIfNeeded not attached).

tests.title: Should open, edit, cancel, and delete via sidebar @smoke

tests.scenarioIntent: The edit sidebar opens pre-filled with a row's data (name, email, job title, CoR), a job-title edit cancelled does not persist, and deleting a contractor decrements the total count (17->16).

tests.title: Should detect errors and fix via sidebar

tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Policies Deep Tests @deep @slow
tests.scenarioIntent: Tests 255-char title, special-char title, and all three timeBasis values in policy creation.
tests.notes: All 3 timeBasis (flexible/schedule_window/total_hours) created successfully. Per-basis workerType: flexible→per_hour, schedule_window→fixed_contractor, total_hours→fixed_contractor. total_hours uses days:[] (no window needed). TODO(cleanup) inline in spec — verify per-basis workerType with product team.

tests.title: TC_TT_API_000: API Health Check @smoke @critical
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Policies
tests.scenarioIntent: GET /health returns 200; verifies TT API is reachable at API_BASE_URL.

tests.title: TC_TT_API_001: Should get all policies with pagination @smoke
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Policies
tests.scenarioIntent: GET /policies returns 200 with pagination envelope (items, page, limit, total_items_count, total_pages_count).

tests.title: TC_TT_API_002: Should get policy by valid ID @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Policies
tests.scenarioIntent: Creates a policy then GET by ID returns 200 with id, title, days array; cleans up after.

tests.title: TC_TT_API_003: Should return 404 for invalid policy ID @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Policies
tests.scenarioIntent: GET /policies/999999 returns 404.

tests.title: TC_TT_API_004: Should create new policy with valid data @regression @critical
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Policies
tests.scenarioIntent: POST /policies with full schedule_window payload returns 201 with id and correct title/timeBasis.

tests.title: TC_TT_API_005: Should reject policy creation with missing required fields @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Policies
tests.scenarioIntent: POST /policies without required title/timeBasis returns 400 with message body.

tests.title: TC_TT_API_006: Should get policies with filters @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Policies
tests.scenarioIntent: GET /policies?timeBasis=schedule_window returns 200; all returned items match the filter.

tests.title: TC_TT_API_007: Should check policy title availability @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Policies
tests.scenarioIntent: Title availability endpoint returns isAvailable=true for a unique never-used title.

tests.title: TC_TT_API_007B: Should detect existing policy title @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Policies
tests.scenarioIntent: After creating a policy, title availability check returns isAvailable=false for the same title.
tests.notes: TODO(merge): ported verbatim as separate test block; consolidate with 8fffcd7bb4aa (TC_TT_API_007) into parametrized available-vs-taken test in cleanup phase.

tests.title: TC_TT_API_009: Should update policy successfully @regression @critical
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Policies
tests.scenarioIntent: PUT/PATCH existing policy updates title and isManualEntryAllowed; response carries new values.

tests.title: TC_TT_API_008: Should delete policy successfully @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Policies
tests.scenarioIntent: DELETE /policies/:id returns 204; subsequent GET returns 404 confirming deletion.

tests.title: TC_TT_POLICY_010: Should replace all policy workers successfully (PUT) @workers @regression @critical
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Policies — Worker Assignment
tests.scenarioIntent: PUT /policies/:id/workers with 2-3 Fixed contract IDs returns 200/204; verifies workers field in GET response.

tests.title: TC_TT_POLICY_011: Should clear all workers with empty array (PUT) @workers @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Policies — Worker Assignment
tests.scenarioIntent: PUT /policies/:id/workers with [] after initial assignment returns 200/204; workers field is empty after.

tests.title: TC_TT_POLICY_012: Should return error for invalid policy ID (PUT) @workers @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Policies — Worker Assignment
tests.scenarioIntent: PUT /policies/999999/workers returns 404.

tests.title: TC_TT_POLICY_013: Should add workers to policy (PATCH - add only) @workers @regression @critical
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Policies — Worker Assignment
tests.scenarioIntent: PATCH /policies/:id/workers adding 2 Fixed contract IDs returns 200/204; workers appear in GET policy response.

tests.title: TC_TT_POLICY_014: Should remove workers from policy (PATCH - remove only) @workers @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Policies — Worker Assignment
tests.scenarioIntent: PATCH removing 1 worker from 3 returns 200/204; worker count in GET response decreases.

tests.title: TC_TT_POLICY_015: Should add and remove workers in same call (PATCH - both) @workers @regression @critical
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Policies — Worker Assignment
tests.scenarioIntent: Single PATCH call adding 2 and removing 1 from 3 yields net 4 workers; verified via GET.

tests.title: TC_TT_POLICY_016: Should return error for invalid policy ID (PATCH) @workers @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Policies — Worker Assignment
tests.scenarioIntent: PATCH /policies/999999/workers returns 404.

tests.title: TC_TT_POLICY_017: Should handle duplicate worker assignment (PATCH - edge case) @workers @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Policies — Worker Assignment
tests.scenarioIntent: Re-adding an already-assigned worker via PATCH is either idempotent (200/204) or rejected (400/409); behavior logged.

tests.title: TC_TT_POLICY_CONTRACT_001: Should return policy for contract with assigned policy @smoke @critical
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Get Policy by Contract @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: GET /policies/contracts/:id returns 200 with correct policyId after assignment; probes for unassigned compatible contract.

tests.title: TC_TT_POLICY_CONTRACT_002: Should return 404 for contract without assigned policy @smoke
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Get Policy by Contract @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: GET /policies/contracts/:id returns 404 for an unassigned contract.

tests.title: TC_TT_POLICY_CONTRACT_003: Should return 404 for non-existent contract ID @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Get Policy by Contract @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: GET /policies/contracts/999999999 returns 404.

tests.title: TC_TT_POLICY_CONTRACT_004: Should return 400 or 404 for negative contract ID @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Get Policy by Contract @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: GET /policies/contracts/-123 returns 400 or 404.

tests.title: TC_TT_POLICY_CONTRACT_005: Should return 400, 403, or 404 for zero contract ID @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Get Policy by Contract @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: GET /policies/contracts/0 returns 400, 403, or 404.

tests.title: TC_TT_POLICY_CONTRACT_006: Should return 404 for very large contract ID @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Get Policy by Contract @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: GET /policies/contracts/Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER returns 404.

tests.title: TC_TT_POLICY_CONTRACT_007: Should return complete policy structure with all required fields @regression @critical
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Get Policy by Contract @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: Assigned policy returned by GET /policies/contracts/:id contains all required shape fields: id, title, timeBasis, flags, days, overtime, timestamps.

tests.title: TC_TT_POLICY_CONTRACT_008: Should verify workers array includes assigned contract @smoke
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Get Policy by Contract @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: After assignment, getPolicyByContract returns the policy; full getPolicyById shows the contractId in workers array.

tests.title: MATRIX-001: PAYG + Flexible policy: assignment succeeds @smoke @critical
tests.describe: Time Tracking - Policy-Contract Matrix @matrix @critical — PAYG Contracts — Custom Policy Assignment @payg
tests.scenarioIntent: PAYG contract assigned to flexible/per_hour policy; getPolicyByContract confirms timeBasis=flexible.

tests.title: MATRIX-002: PAYG + Schedule Window policy: assignment succeeds @regression @critical
tests.describe: Time Tracking - Policy-Contract Matrix @matrix @critical — PAYG Contracts — Custom Policy Assignment @payg
tests.scenarioIntent: PAYG contract assigned to schedule_window/per_hour policy; response confirms timeBasis and non-empty days.

tests.title: MATRIX-003: PAYG + Total Hours Policy @regression @critical
tests.describe: Time Tracking - Policy-Contract Matrix @matrix @critical — PAYG Contracts — Custom Policy Assignment @payg
tests.scenarioIntent: PAYG contract assigned to total_hours policy; response confirms timeBasis and isEditingAllowed=false.

tests.title: MATRIX-004: PAYG + No Overtime Policy @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking - Policy-Contract Matrix @matrix @critical — PAYG Contracts — Custom Policy Assignment @payg
tests.scenarioIntent: Second PAYG contract assigned to flexible policy with no overtime; response confirms overtime field is null.

tests.title: MATRIX-005: All contract types with all policy time bases — create, assign, verify @regression @critical
tests.describe: Time Tracking - Policy-Contract Matrix @matrix @critical — Non-PAYG Contract/Policy Combinations @matrix
tests.scenarioIntent: Skipped: EOR contract minting (~2-3 min each) blows per-test timeout; re-enable after EOR is pre-provisioned in pool seeder.
blockers: Skipped: EOR contract minting (~2-3 min each) blows per-test timeout; re-enable after EOR is pre-provisioned in pool seeder.

tests.title: MATRIX-017: Multiple PAYG contracts on one per_hour policy @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking - Policy-Contract Matrix @matrix @critical — Multi-Contract Policy Assignments @multi
tests.scenarioIntent: Two PAYG contracts assigned to the same policy each resolve to that policy via getPolicyByContract.

tests.title: MATRIX-018: Reassign contract from one policy to another @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking - Policy-Contract Matrix @matrix @critical — Multi-Contract Policy Assignments @multi
tests.scenarioIntent: Removing a Fixed contract from policy1 and assigning to policy2 reflects correctly in getPolicyByContract.

tests.title: TC_TT_SESSION_001: Should return complete session details for active session @smoke @critical
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Session Details - Auto-Tracker Sessions @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: Active auto-tracker session GET returns all required fields including state='active', subsessions, attachments, policy.

tests.title: TC_TT_SESSION_002: Should return session details for paused session with correct pausedMinutes @smoke
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Session Details - Auto-Tracker Sessions @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: Paused auto-tracker session GET returns state='paused' and non-negative pausedMinutes.

tests.title: TC_TT_SESSION_003: Should return session details for completed session with endTime and totalMinutes @critical
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Session Details - Auto-Tracker Sessions @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: xfail sandbox: completed auto-tracker sessions return endTime=null instead of the actual end time.
blockers: xfail sandbox: completed auto-tracker sessions return endTime=null instead of the actual end time.

tests.title: TC_TT_SESSION_004: Should return session with subsessions array populated after pause/resume @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Session Details - Auto-Tracker Sessions @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: After two pause/resume cycles the session's subsessions array is non-empty with correct shape.

tests.title: TC_TT_SESSION_005: Updating an active (ongoing) session is rejected @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Session Details - Auto-Tracker Sessions @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: PATCH on an active auto-tracker session is rejected with a 4xx; session stays active and unchanged.

tests.title: TC_TT_SESSION_006: Should return 404 for non-existent session ID @smoke @critical
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Session Details - Error Handling @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: GET /time-sessions/999999999 returns 404 Not Found.

tests.title: TC_TT_SESSION_007: Should return 400 or 404 for negative session ID @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Session Details - Error Handling @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: GET with negative ID returns 400 or 404 (invalid format or not found).

tests.title: TC_TT_SESSION_008: Should return 400, 403, or 404 for zero session ID @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Session Details - Error Handling @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: GET with sessionId=0 returns one of 400/403/404.

tests.title: TC_TT_SESSION_009: Should return 404 or 400 for very large session ID @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Session Details - Error Handling @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: GET with Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER returns 404 or 400 (overflow or not found).

tests.title: TC_TT_SESSION_010: Should return 404 for deleted session @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Session Details - Error Handling @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: Create, end, delete a session then verify GET returns 404 (conditionally skips if delete not supported).

tests.title: TC_TT_SESSION_011: Manual entry returns complete session details @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Manual Time Entries @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: Manual entry GET returns all required fields including state='completed', reviewStatus='pending', contractId.

tests.title: TC_TT_SESSION_012: Manual entry is immediately in completed state @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Manual Time Entries @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: Manual entry with startTime+endTime is immediately state='completed', never active or paused.

tests.title: TC_TT_SESSION_013: Manual entry has exactly one subsession @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Manual Time Entries @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: Manual entry subsessions array contains exactly 1 item.

tests.title: TC_TT_SESSION_014: totalMinutes matches slot duration, pausedMinutes is 0 @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Manual Time Entries @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: Manual entry of 120 min has totalMinutes=120, workedMinutes=120, pausedMinutes=0.

tests.title: TC_TT_ENTRY_001: Worker blocked when isManualEntryAllowed=false @regression @critical
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Manual Time Entries @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: Policy with manualEntry=false blocks worker manual entry with 400/403/422.

tests.title: TC_TT_ENTRY_002: Missing startTime (endTime only) — API rejects @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Manual Time Entries @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: POST manual entry with endTime but no startTime returns 400 or 422.

tests.title: TC_TT_ENTRY_003: Missing contractId — API rejects @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Manual Time Entries @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: POST manual entry with no contractId returns 400 or 422.

tests.title: TC_TT_ENTRY_004: Zero-duration entry (startTime === endTime) does not 500 @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Manual Time Entries @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: Zero-duration entry (start=end) does not return 500; product decision on accept/reject pending.

tests.title: TC_TT_ENTRY_005: Negative-duration entry (startTime > endTime) does not 500 @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Manual Time Entries @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: Inverted start/end entry does not return 500; product decision on accept/reject pending.

tests.title: TC_TT_ENTRY_006: Client creates manual entry on behalf of worker @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Manual Time Entries @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: Client-created manual entry is state='completed' and reviewStatus='pending' (not auto-approved).

tests.title: TC_TT_ENTRY_007: Worker edits title and note of manual entry @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Manual Time Entries @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: PATCH with new title and note updates stored title and note while state stays 'completed'.

tests.title: TC_TT_ENTRY_008: Delete pending manual entry @regression
tests.describe: Time Tracking API - Manual Time Entries @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: DELETE pending manual entry returns 204 and subsequent GET returns 404.
